programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Federal agents seek to unmask the anonymous mastermind of the world's largest online and underground drug bazaar, despite potential corruption within their own ranks.

programme.title: America's Next Investment
programme.desc: America's Next Investment: Exploring Opportunities in AI,Tech, Real Estate, Alcohol, Cannabis, and More. Tune in to discover how to invest!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When an epidemic of teenage nicotine addiction breaks out across the country, some people ask whether Juul's founders are intent on saving lives or targeting the next generation.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A car belonging to a missing man erupts in a blaze, leading to clues regarding his whereabouts.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Convicted fraudster and identity thief Tracii Show Hutsona is again up on federal charges after a high-profile client discovers more than $1 million missing from her bank accounts.

programme.title: How to Get Your Money Right
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist and civil rights acitivist Dr. Benjamin F. Chavis Jr. talks about how to deal with business, banking and market by exploring the latest concepts and strategies for personal economic growth.

programme.title: The American Dream
programme.desc: The American dream, a real show, highlighting real stories of our neighborhoods, culture, and real estate. Emmy nominated production team.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Flu? Urgent Care at Home with The Wellness Docs
programme.desc: Brutal flu/cold season is here. Have an urgent care and pharmacy in your home - with The Wellness Doctors.

programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: The Truth About Social Security & Your Retirement
programme.desc: Prices are rising, and Social Security may not keep up. Learn practical ways to protect your money and retirement lifestyle in today's economy.

programme.title: Learn More About Medicare Advantage Plans from Humana
programme.desc: Learn about the variety of Humana Medicare plans designed to fit people's needs, lifestyle, and budget.

programme.title: Silver Eagle Rarity
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a groundbreaking 2025 American Silver Eagle featuring the first ever Eagle privy mark, graded perfect MS70. This unique issue ties for the lowest mintage Silver eagle and marks the first time an Eagle has been seen on the obverse!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Silver Rarities Set
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a stunning complete Set of 43: 1986-2025 American Silver Eagles graded in Mint State 69; this set includes the first ever Star Privy mark issue, plus the Eagle Privy issue as a free bonus to create the ultimate ASE collection!

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A "hate connection" app; an invention involving coconut water; reducing chronic disease by doing lab work at home; a quick breakfast solution.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A new take on a traditional snack food; a single-serve all-in-one portable coffee product; a beverage line made from real herbs, fruits and flowers; a patented design that makes taking care of newborns easier.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An easy-to-use organic skin care product line born from a personal need; confidence-boosting swimwear; a convenient tool that helps combat an annoying problem; a jewelry brand made from a unique recycled material; an update on Bunch Bikes.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A convenient new style of eating authentic Korean food; a product designed to help with one's wellness routine; a take on a common cooking tool; a version of a sports medicine product specifically designed for athletes; an update on Souper Cubes.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A portable product for those who enjoy camping without the dangers of creating a wildfire; a smoothie-making machine; an oral health product; a portable cooler accessory; an update on fashion business No Limbits; guest shark Daniel Lubetzky.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An heirloom keepsake trunk; an easy-to-sew quilt kit; a line of seamless swimsuits and outdoor performance socks created for women; Jamie Kern Lima guest sharks.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Beauty products specially formulated for redheads; a stylish bird house equipped with a hidden camera; an app for plant care; a splash guard for bath time.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A self-tanner geared toward men; a new-and-improved flashlight; a reusable cup service for marathoners; an authentic instant pho.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A "hate connection" app; an invention involving coconut water; reducing chronic disease by doing lab work at home; a quick breakfast solution.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A convenient new style of eating authentic Korean food; a product designed to help with one's wellness routine; a take on a common cooking tool; a version of a sports medicine product specifically designed for athletes; an update on Souper Cubes.
